name: Top bar

variants.name: standard
variants.description: Full width for responsive layout S–M without main menu. Includes burger icon button for main menu overlay.

variants.name: with_main_menu
variants.description: For responsive layouts L–XL. Stretches to width remaining to the right of the main menu.

icon_buttons.note: Global actions shown at the right. Only most important.

show_burger.note: Auto-shown in responsive layout M and S

horizontal_padding.note: Horizontal inner padding for top bar

layout_behaviour.with_main_menu: Stretches to remaining width to the right of main menu (layout L–XL)

usage_rules.detail: Layout templates already contain a top bar. Do not add a second one.
Do not overcrowd the top bar. Only include the most important global actions as icon buttons.

usage_rules.rule: Top bar is not for page-level actions
usage_rules.detail: Page-specific actions belong in the page header or action bars, not the top bar.

confidence_blockers: If ticket adds a top bar to a layout that already includes one, flag as duplication.
If ticket adds many icon buttons to top bar, flag and ask which are truly global and essential.

embedding_text: Top bar component. Global header navigation bar app bar. Contains icon buttons for global functionality notifications user menu avatar. Burger icon for mobile layouts S M to show main menu overlay. Stretches full width or to right of main menu depending on layout. Already included in layout templates do not duplicate.
